items.title: If I Could Buy Only 1 "Magnificent Seven" Stock Over the Next 10 Years, This Would Be It (Hint: Not Nvidia)
items.description: The Magnificent Seven stocks are the cream of the crop when it comes to AI, but one has a clear advantage.

items.title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq futures climb with Fed, Big Tech earnings, Trump-Xi meeting ahead
items.description: Futures on the major gauges rose overnight Sunday ahead of a packed week of economic events.

items.title: Stock Futures Rise Ahead of Mag 7 Earnings, Fed Decision
items.description: The markets are entering the final week of October, which will feature more earnings, a Fed meeting, and President Trump’s meeting with China’s Xi.

items.title: Alger Spectra Fund Q3 2025 Portfolio Update
items.description: Victory Capital Management reports a 3.45% Q3 return for RS Partners Fund, trailing its benchmark. See how active value investing targets long-term upside.

items.title: Fed Rate Decision; UnitedHealth, Apple, Microsoft, Visa Earnings; and Many More Stocks to Watch This Week
items.description: A quarter-point rate cut is all but certain at this week’s Federal Open Market Committee meeting. And we’ll see earnings reports from roughly 160 S&P 500 companies.
